description: Gold-equity rotation. 5-factor: SPY/GLD ratio z-score, 20d momentum + MA50/MA200, 5d persistence, GDX+SLV strength, DXY overlay. GOLD_BREAKOUT_RICH or EQUITY_DOMINANT_RICH. Erb-Harvey 2013, Baur-Lucey 2010. ~60% hit / +5-8% / 8-16wk. Daily 22:45 UTC.
